trajectory_goal: Use GPT-5.4 with the explicit SkillBank to generate high-quality single-hop retrieval trajectories before building B1.
notes: B1 should actively add high-quality single-hop skills when the evidence supports distinct reusable retrieval patterns.
Do not stay overly conservative: allow the teacher model to introduce specialized lookup, verification, and answer-finalization skills when they reduce ambiguity.
Still preserve compatibility with later multihop rounds and avoid adding near-duplicate skills with fuzzy boundaries.
